title: Peach Pudding Dessert
description: A rich and decadent dessert made with peaches and creamy pudding, perfect for warm weather.
instructions: Peel and slice the peaches into wedges.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the pudding mix and heavy cream.
Add the sugar and cinnamon to the pudding mixture and stir until well combined.
Pour the pudding mixture into individual serving cups or a large baking dish.
Arrange the peach wedges on top of the pudding mixture.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the pudding is set and the peaches are tender.
Serve warm or chilled, topped with whipped cream or additional peaches if desired.
